IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY NARALLANI SANCHEZ LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALISTS. DEFENDANT LUCIANO DE MELO MENEZES NETO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $551.25 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MENEZES NETO, LUCIANO DE MELO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-17-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-17-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENEZES NETO, LUCIANO DE MELO $551.25 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $631.25 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
